revision.text:
'''辛丑'''（かのとうし、しんちゅう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて38番目で、前は[[庚子]]、次は[[壬寅]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は金、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#相生|相生]]（土生金）である。
==辛丑の年==
==辛丑の日== ===[[選日]]=== 辛丑の日は[[天一天上]]の9日目である。

revision.comment: Programmatically generating so that if this gets imported to wikipedia as a draft, the bot will attribute it to Immanuelle and send them g6 warnings

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''辛丑'''（かのとうし、しんきんのうし、しんちゅう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの38番目で、前は[[庚子]]、次は[[壬寅]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[丑]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。
==辛丑の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って41が余る年が辛丑の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛丑の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[41年]] *[[101年]] *[[161年]] *[[221年]] *[[281年]] *[[341年]] *[[401年]] *[[461年]] *[[521年]] *[[581年]] *[[641年]] *[[701年]] *[[761年]] *[[821年]] *[[881年]] *[[941年]] | *[[1001年]] *[[1061年]] *[[1121年]] *[[1181年]] *[[1241年]] *[[1301年]] *[[1361年]] *[[1421年]] *[[1481年]] *[[1541年]] *[[1601年]] *[[1661年]] *[[1721年]] *[[1781年]] *[[1841年]] *[[1901年]] *[[1961年]] | *[[2021年]] *[[2081年]] *[[2141年]] *[[2201年]] *[[2261年]] *[[2321年]] *[[2381年]] *[[2441年]] *[[2501年]] *[[2561年]] *[[2621年]] *[[2681年]] *[[2741年]] *[[2801年]] *[[2861年]] *[[2921年]] *[[2981年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[光緒]]27年・[[明治]]34年（1901年） - 北清事変（[[義和団の乱]]）に出兵した露を除く連合軍と、墺・白・西、そして清の11ヵ国間で[[辛丑和約]]（北京議定書）が調印される。
==辛丑の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[12月]]が辛丑の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小寒]]から[[立春]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==辛丑の日== ===選日=== 辛丑の日は[[天一天上]]の9日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かのとうし}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:辛丑]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[ja:辛丑]]

==辛丑の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って41が余る年が辛丑の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛丑の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[41年]] *[[101年]] *[[161年]] *[[221年]] *[[281年]] *[[341年]] *[[401年]] *[[461年]] *[[521年]] *[[581年]] *[[641年]] *[[701年]] *[[761年]] *[[821年]] *[[881年]] *[[941年]] | *[[1001年]] *[[1061年]] *[[1121年]] *[[1181年]] *[[1241年]] *[[1301年]] *[[1361年]] *[[1421年]] *[[1481年]] *[[1541年]] *[[1601年]] *[[1661年]] *[[1721年]] *[[1781年]] *[[1841年]] *[[1901年]] *[[1961年]] | *[[2021年]] *[[2081年]] *[[2141年]] *[[2201年]] *[[2261年]] *[[2321年]] *[[2381年]] *[[2441年]] *[[2501年]] *[[2561年]] *[[2621年]] *[[2681年]] *[[2741年]] *[[2801年]] *[[2861年]] *[[2921年]] *[[2981年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[光緒]]27年・[[明治]]34年（1901年） - 北清事変（[[義和団の乱]]）に出兵した露を除く連合軍と、墺・白・西、そして清の11ヵ国間で[[辛丑和約]]（北京議定書）が調印される。
==辛丑の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[12月]]が辛丑の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小寒]]から[[立春]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==辛丑の日== ===選日=== 辛丑の日は[[天一天上]]の9日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かのとうし}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Ox-qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:辛丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:辛丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Ox-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Metal Ox}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:MAINSPACE]] [[ja:辛丑]]

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''辛丑'''（かのとうし、しんきんのうし、しんちゅう）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの38番目で、前は[[庚子]]、次は[[壬寅]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[丑]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。
==辛丑の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って41が余る年が辛丑の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛丑の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[41年]] *[[101年]] *[[161年]] *[[221年]] *[[281年]] *[[341年]] *[[401年]] *[[461年]] *[[521年]] *[[581年]] *[[641年]] *[[701年]] *[[761年]] *[[821年]] *[[881年]] *[[941年]] | *[[1001年]] *[[1061年]] *[[1121年]] *[[1181年]] *[[1241年]] *[[1301年]] *[[1361年]] *[[1421年]] *[[1481年]] *[[1541年]] *[[1601年]] *[[1661年]] *[[1721年]] *[[1781年]] *[[1841年]] *[[1901年]] *[[1961年]] | *[[2021年]] *[[2081年]] *[[2141年]] *[[2201年]] *[[2261年]] *[[2321年]] *[[2381年]] *[[2441年]] *[[2501年]] *[[2561年]] *[[2621年]] *[[2681年]] *[[2741年]] *[[2801年]] *[[2861年]] *[[2921年]] *[[2981年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[光緒]]27年・[[明治]]34年（1901年） - 北清事変（[[義和団の乱]]）に出兵した露を除く連合軍と、墺・白・西、そして清の11ヵ国間で[[辛丑和約]]（北京議定書）が調印される。
==辛丑の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[12月]]が辛丑の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小寒]]から[[立春]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==辛丑の日== ===選日=== 辛丑の日は[[天一天上]]の9日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|かのとうし}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Ox-qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:辛丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:辛丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Ox-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Metal Ox}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[ja:辛丑]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[ja:Yin Metal Ox]]

Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの38番目で、前は[[庚子]]、次は[[壬寅]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[丑]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。

==辛丑の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[12月]]が辛丑の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小寒]]から[[立春]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==辛丑の日== ===選日=== 辛丑の日は[[天一天上]]の9日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|かのとうし}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Ox-qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:辛丑]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:辛丑]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Ox-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Metal Ox}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[ja:辛丑]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yin Metal Ox]]

Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの38番目で、前は[[庚子]]、次は[[壬寅]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[丑]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。
==辛丑の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って41が余る年が辛丑の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛丑の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[41年]] *[[101年]] *[[161年]] *[[221年]] *[[281年]] *[[341年]] *[[401年]] *[[461年]] *[[521年]] *[[581年]] *[[641年]] *[[701年]] *[[761年]] *[[821年]] *[[881年]] *[[941年]] | *[[1001年]] *[[1061年]] *[[1121年]] *[[1181年]] *[[1241年]] *[[1301年]] *[[1361年]] *[[1421年]] *[[1481年]] *[[1541年]] *[[1601年]] *[[1661年]] *[[1721年]] *[[1781年]] *[[1841年]] *[[1901年]] *[[1961年]] | *[[2021年]] *[[2081年]] *[[2141年]] *[[2201年]] *[[2261年]] *[[2321年]] *[[2381年]] *[[2441年]] *[[2501年]] *[[2561年]] *[[2621年]] *[[2681年]] *[[2741年]] *[[2801年]] *[[2861年]] *[[2921年]] *[[2981年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[光緒]]27年・[[明治]]34年（1901年） - 北清事変（[[義和団の乱]]）に出兵した露を除く連合軍と、墺・白・西、そして清の11ヵ国間で[[辛丑和約]]（北京議定書）が調印される。
==辛丑の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[12月]]が辛丑の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小寒]]から[[立春]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==辛丑の日== ===選日=== 辛丑の日は[[天一天上]]の9日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|かのとうし}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Ox-qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:辛丑]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:辛丑]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Ox-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Metal Ox}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[ja:辛丑]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yin Metal Ox]]

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904956]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Ox|kanji=辛丑|romaji=kanoto ushi|onyomi=shinchū|p=xīnchǒu|w=hsin-ch'ou|mi=ɕin⁵³ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=san1 chau2|j=san1 chau2|ci=sɐn tsʰɐu̯|mc=sin tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=sin ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Ox''' (辛丑) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 38th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Gengzi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|lt=Gengzi|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengzi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Renyin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|lt=Renyin|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renyin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the Heavenly Stem {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents yin metal and the Earthly Branch {{ill|Chou|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin earth; according to the theory of mutual generation (土生金) in the Five Elements philosophy, earth generates metal.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Ox (辛丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: shinchu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinchuk (신축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Metal Ox (辛丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうし (kanoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうし (shinka-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: しんちゅう (shinchū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinchuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Ox== A year is designated as a Yin Metal Ox year when the Western calendar year divided by 60 leaves a remainder of 41. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Yin Metal Ox''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:AD 41|41 AD]] * [[:en:AD 101|101 AD]] * [[:en:161|161 AD]] * [[:en:221|221 AD]] * [[:en:281|281 AD]] * [[:en:341|341 AD]] * [[:en:401|401 AD]] * [[:en:461|461 AD]] * [[:en:521|521 AD]] * [[:en:581|581 AD]] * [[:en:641|641 AD]] * [[:en:701|701 AD]] * [[:en:761|761 AD]] * [[:en:821|821 AD]] * [[:en:881|881 AD]] * [[:en:941|941 AD]] | * [[:en:1001|1001 AD]] * [[:en:1061|1061 AD]] * [[:en:1121|1121 AD]] * [[:en:1181|1181 AD]] * [[:en:1241|1241 AD]] * [[:en:1301|1301 AD]] * [[:en:1361|1361 AD]] * [[:en:1421|1421 AD]] * [[:en:1481|1481 AD]] * [[:en:1541|1541 AD]] * [[:en:1601|1601 AD]] * [[:en:1661|1661 AD]] * [[:en:1721|1721 AD]] * [[:en:1781|1781 AD]] * [[:en:1841|1841 AD]] * [[:en:1901|1901 AD]] * [[:en:1961|1961 AD]] | * [[:en:2021|2021 AD]] * {{ill|2081 AD|ja|2081年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2081 AD|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 2080年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * {{ill|2141 AD|ja|2141年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2141 AD|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11177}} * {{ill|2201 AD|ja|2201年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2201 AD|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q49832}} * {{ill|2261 AD|ja|2261年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2261 AD|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q49832}} * {{ill|2321 AD|ja|2321年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2321 AD|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 24世紀|1=24th century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q49838}} * {{ill|2381 AD|ja|2381年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2381 AD|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2441 AD|ja|2441年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2441 AD|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2501 AD|ja|2501年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2501 AD|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2561 AD|ja|2561年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2561 AD|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2621 AD|ja|2621年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2621 AD|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2681 AD|ja|2681年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2681 AD|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2741 AD|ja|2741年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2741 AD|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2801 AD|ja|2801年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2801 AD|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2861 AD|ja|2861年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2861 AD|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2921 AD|ja|2921年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2921 AD|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2981 AD|ja|2981年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2981 AD|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |}
=== Events === * In {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|qq=|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} 27th Year and [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 34th Year (1901 AD) – The {{ill|Beijing Protocol|ja|辛丑和約|lt=Beijing Protocol|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beijing Protocol|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 北京議定書|1=Boxer Protocol|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q672556}}, concerning the Boxer Rebellion (excluding Russia) among a coalition of 11 countries (including Austria, Britain, and France) and the Qing Empire, was signed. ==Months of Yin Metal Ox== In a Western calendar year whose last digit is either 1 or 6 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of December becomes the Yin Metal Ox month. (Note that here “month” may refer either to the month of the old calendar or to a seasonal month defined from [[:en:Xiaohan|Xiaohan]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]].)
==Days of Yin Metal Ox== === 選日 === The Yin Metal Ox day is the 9th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904956]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Ox|kanji=辛丑|romaji=kanoto ushi|onyomi=shinchū|p=xīnchǒu|w=hsin-ch'ou|mi=ɕin⁵³ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=san1 chau2|j=san1 chau2|ci=sɐn tsʰɐu̯|mc=sin tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=sin ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Ox''' (辛丑) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 38th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Gengzi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|lt=Gengzi|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengzi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Renyin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|lt=Renyin|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renyin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the Heavenly Stem {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents yin metal and the Earthly Branch {{ill|Chou|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin earth; according to the theory of mutual generation (土生金) in the Five Elements philosophy, earth generates metal.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Ox (辛丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: shinchu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinchuk (신축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu

--> ==Years of Yin Metal Ox== A year is designated as a Yin Metal Ox year when the Western calendar year divided by 60 leaves a remainder of 41. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Yin Metal Ox''' |- ! (Note that here “month” may refer either to the month of the old calendar or to a seasonal month defined from [[:en:Xiaohan|Xiaohan]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]].)
==Days of Yin Metal Ox== === 選日 === The Yin Metal Ox day is the 9th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-tiū]][[de:Metall-Büffel]][[hak:Sîn-chhiú]][[ja:辛丑]][[ko:신축]][[vi:Tân Sửu]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh_min_nan:Sin-thiú]][[zh_yue:辛丑]][[zh:辛丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904956]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Ox|kanji=辛丑|romaji=kanoto ushi|onyomi=shinchū|p=xīnchǒu|w=hsin-ch'ou|mi=ɕin⁵³ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=san1 chau2|j=san1 chau2|ci=sɐn tsʰɐu̯|mc=sin tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=sin ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Ox''' (辛丑) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 38th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Gengzi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|lt=Gengzi|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengzi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Renyin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|lt=Renyin|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renyin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the Heavenly Stem {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents yin metal and the Earthly Branch {{ill|Chou|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin earth; according to the theory of mutual generation (土生金) in the Five Elements philosophy, earth generates metal.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Ox (辛丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: shinchu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinchuk (신축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu

=== Events === * In {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|qq=|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} 27th Year and [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 34th Year (1901 AD) – The {{ill|Beijing Protocol|ja|辛丑和約|lt=Beijing Protocol|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beijing Protocol|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 北京議定書|1=Boxer Protocol|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q672556}}, concerning the Boxer Rebellion (excluding Russia) among a coalition of 11 countries (including Austria, Britain, and France) and the Qing Empire, was signed. ==Months of Yin Metal Ox== In a Western calendar year whose last digit is either 1 or 6 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of December becomes the Yin Metal Ox month. (Note that here “month” may refer either to the month of the old calendar or to a seasonal month defined from [[:en:Xiaohan|Xiaohan]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]].)
==Days of Yin Metal Ox== === 選日 === The Yin Metal Ox day is the 9th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-tiū]][[de:Metall-Büffel]][[hak:Sîn-chhiú]][[ja:辛丑]][[ko:신축]][[vi:Tân Sửu]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-thiú]][[zh_yue:辛丑]][[zh:辛丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904956]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Ox|kanji=辛丑|romaji=kanoto ushi|onyomi=shinchū|p=xīnchǒu|w=hsin-ch'ou|mi=ɕin⁵³ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=san1 chau2|j=san1 chau2|ci=sɐn tsʰɐu̯|mc=sin tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=sin ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Ox''' (辛丑) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 38th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Gengzi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|lt=Gengzi|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengzi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Renyin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|lt=Renyin|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renyin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the Heavenly Stem {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents yin metal and the Earthly Branch {{ill|Chou|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin earth; according to the theory of mutual generation (土生金) in the Five Elements philosophy, earth generates metal.

=== Events === * In {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|qq=|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} 27th Year and [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 34th Year (1901 AD) – The {{ill|Beijing Protocol|ja|辛丑和約|lt=Beijing Protocol|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beijing Protocol|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 北京議定書|1=Boxer Protocol|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q672556}}, concerning the Boxer Rebellion (excluding Russia) among a coalition of 11 countries (including Austria, Britain, and France) and the Qing Empire, was signed. ==Months of Yin Metal Ox== In a Western calendar year whose last digit is either 1 or 6 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of December becomes the Yin Metal Ox month. (Note that here “month” may refer either to the month of the old calendar or to a seasonal month defined from [[:en:Xiaohan|Xiaohan]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]].)
==Days of Yin Metal Ox== === 選日 === The Yin Metal Ox day is the 9th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-tiū]][[de:Metall-Büffel]][[hak:Sîn-chhiú]][[ja:辛丑]][[ko:신축]][[vi:Tân Sửu]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-thiú]][[zh-yue:辛丑]][[zh:辛丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904956]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Ox|kanji=辛丑|romaji=kanoto ushi|onyomi=shinchū|p=xīnchǒu|w=hsin-ch'ou|mi=ɕin⁵³ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=san1 chau2|j=san1 chau2|ci=sɐn tsʰɐu̯|mc=sin tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=sin ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Ox''' (辛丑) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 38th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Gengzi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|lt=Gengzi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengzi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Renyin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|lt=Renyin|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renyin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the Heavenly Stem {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents yin metal and the Earthly Branch {{ill|Chou|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin earth; according to the theory of mutual generation (土生金) in the Five Elements philosophy, earth generates metal.

=== Events === * In {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} 27th Year and [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 34th Year (1901 AD) – The {{ill|Beijing Protocol|ja|辛丑和約|lt=Beijing Protocol|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beijing Protocol|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 北京議定書|1=Boxer Protocol|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q672556}}, concerning the Boxer Rebellion (excluding Russia) among a coalition of 11 countries (including Austria, Britain, and France) and the Qing Empire, was signed. ==Months of Yin Metal Ox== In a Western calendar year whose last digit is either 1 or 6 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of December becomes the Yin Metal Ox month. (Note that here “month” may refer either to the month of the old calendar or to a seasonal month defined from [[:en:Xiaohan|Xiaohan]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]].)
==Days of Yin Metal Ox== === 選日 === The Yin Metal Ox day is the 9th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:Kí-chhá]] [[zh-yue:己巳]]
{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Ox|qq=ja|辛丑|version=98658119|comment=Imported full ja history}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-tiū]][[de:Metall-Büffel]][[hak:Sîn-chhiú]][[ja:辛丑]][[ko:신축]][[vi:Tân Sửu]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-thiú]][[zh-yue:辛丑]][[zh:辛丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904956]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Ox|kanji=辛丑|romaji=kanoto ushi|onyomi=shinchū|p=xīnchǒu|w=hsin-ch'ou|mi=ɕin⁵³ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=san1 chau2|j=san1 chau2|ci=sɐn tsʰɐu̯|mc=sin tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=sin ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Ox''' (辛丑) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 38th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Gengzi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|lt=Gengzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengzi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Renyin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|lt=Renyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renyin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the Heavenly Stem {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents yin metal and the Earthly Branch {{ill|Chou|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin earth; according to the theory of mutual generation (土生金) in the Five Elements philosophy, earth generates metal.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Ox (辛丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: shinchu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinchuk (신축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu

--> ==Years of Yin Metal Ox== A year is designated as a Yin Metal Ox year when the Western calendar year divided by 60 leaves a remainder of 41. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Yin Metal Ox''' |- ! <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-tiū]][[de:Metall-Büffel]][[hak:Sîn-chhiú]][[ja:辛丑]][[ko:신축]][[vi:Tân Sửu]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-thiú]][[zh-yue:辛丑]][[zh:辛丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904956]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Ox|kanji=辛丑|romaji=kanoto ushi|onyomi=shinchū|p=xīnchǒu|w=hsin-ch'ou|mi=ɕin⁵³ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=san1 chau2|j=san1 chau2|ci=sɐn tsʰɐu̯|mc=sin tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=sin ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Ox''' (辛丑) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 38th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Gengzi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|lt=Gengzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengzi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Renyin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|lt=Renyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renyin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the Heavenly Stem {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents yin metal and the Earthly Branch {{ill|Chou|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin earth; according to the theory of mutual generation (土生金) in the Five Elements philosophy, earth generates metal.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Ox (辛丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: shinchu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinchuk (신축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Metal Ox (辛丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうし (kanoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうし (shinka-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: しんちゅう (shinchū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinchuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Ox== A year is designated as a Yin Metal Ox year when the Western calendar year divided by 60 leaves a remainder of 41. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Yin Metal Ox''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! AD|ja|2981年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2981 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |}
=== Events === * In {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} 27th Year and [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 34th Year (1901 AD) – The {{ill|Beijing Protocol|ja|辛丑和約|lt=Beijing Protocol|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beijing Protocol|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 北京議定書|1=Boxer Protocol|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q672556}}, concerning the Boxer Rebellion (excluding Russia) among a coalition of 11 countries (including Austria, Britain, and France) and the Qing Empire, was signed. ==Months of Yin Metal Ox== In a Western calendar year whose last digit is either 1 or 6 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of December becomes the Yin Metal Ox month. (Note that here “month” may refer either to the month of the old calendar or to a seasonal month defined from [[:en:Xiaohan|Xiaohan]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]].)
==Days of Yin Metal Ox== === 選日 === The Yin Metal Ox day is the 9th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 38th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Gengzi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|lt=Gengzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengzi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Renyin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|lt=Renyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renyin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the Heavenly Stem {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents yin metal and the Earthly Branch {{ill|Chou|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin earth; according to the theory of mutual generation (土生金) in the Five Elements philosophy, earth generates metal.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Ox (辛丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: shinchu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinchuk (신축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu

=== Events === * In {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} 27th Year and [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 34th Year (1901 AD) – The {{ill|Beijing Protocol|ja|辛丑和約|lt=Beijing Protocol|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beijing Protocol|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 北京議定書|1=Boxer Protocol|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q672556}}, concerning the Boxer Rebellion (excluding Russia) among a coalition of 11 countries (including Austria, Britain, and France) and the Qing Empire, was signed. ==Months of Yin Metal Ox== In a Western calendar year whose last digit is either 1 or 6 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of December becomes the Yin Metal Ox month. (Note that here “month” may refer either to the month of the old calendar or to a seasonal month defined from [[:en:Xiaohan|Xiaohan]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]].)
==Days of Yin Metal Ox== === 選日 === The Yin Metal Ox day is the 9th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

=== Events === * In {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} 27th Year and [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 34th Year (1901 AD) – The {{ill|Beijing Protocol|ja|辛丑和約|lt=Beijing Protocol|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beijing Protocol|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 北京議定書|1=Boxer Protocol|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q672556}}, concerning the Boxer Rebellion (excluding Russia) among a coalition of 11 countries (including Austria, Britain, and France) and the Qing Empire, was signed. ==Months of Yin Metal Ox== In a Western calendar year whose last digit is either 1 or 6 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of December becomes the Yin Metal Ox month. (Note that here “month” may refer either to the month of the old calendar or to a seasonal month defined from [[:en:Xiaohan|Xiaohan]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]].)
==Days of Yin Metal Ox== === 選日 === The Yin Metal Ox day is the 9th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

=== Events === * In {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} 27th Year and [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 34th Year (1901 AD) – The {{ill|Beijing Protocol|ja|辛丑和約|lt=Beijing Protocol|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beijing Protocol|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 北京議定書|1=Boxer Protocol|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q672556}}, concerning the Boxer Rebellion (excluding Russia) among a coalition of 11 countries (including Austria, Britain, and France) and the Qing Empire, was signed. ==Months of Yin Metal Ox== In a Western calendar year whose last digit is either 1 or 6 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of December becomes the Yin Metal Ox month. (Note that here “month” may refer either to the month of the old calendar or to a seasonal month defined from [[:en:Xiaohan|Xiaohan]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]].)
==Days of Yin Metal Ox== === 選日 === The Yin Metal Ox day is the 9th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-tiū]][[de:Metall-Büffel]][[hak:Sîn-chhiú]][[ja:辛丑]][[ko:신축]][[vi:Tân Sửu]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-thiú]][[zh-yue:辛丑]][[zh:辛丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904956]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Ox|kanji=辛丑|romaji=kanoto ushi|onyomi=shinchū|p=xīnchǒu|w=hsin-ch'ou|mi=ɕin⁵³ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=san1 chau2|j=san1 chau2|ci=sɐn tsʰɐu̯|mc=sin tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=sin ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Ox''' (辛丑) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 38th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Gengzi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|lt=Gengzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengzi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Renyin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|lt=Renyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renyin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the Heavenly Stem {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents yin metal and the Earthly Branch {{ill|Chou|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin earth; according to the theory of mutual generation (土生金) in the Five Elements philosophy, earth generates metal.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Ox (辛丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: shinchu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinchuk (신축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu

--> ==Years of Yin Metal Ox== A year is designated as a Yin Metal Ox year when the Western calendar year divided by 60 leaves a remainder of 41. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Yin Metal Ox''' |- ! === Events === * In {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} 27th Year and [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 34th Year (1901 AD) – The {{ill|Beijing Protocol|ja|辛丑和約|lt=Beijing Protocol|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beijing Protocol|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 北京議定書|1=Boxer Protocol|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q672556}}, concerning the Boxer Rebellion (excluding Russia) among a coalition of 11 countries (including Austria, Britain, and France) and the Qing Empire, was signed. ==Months of Yin Metal Ox== In a Western calendar year whose last digit is either 1 or 6 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of December becomes the Yin Metal Ox month. (Note that here “month” may refer either to the month of the old calendar or to a seasonal month defined from [[:en:Xiaohan|Xiaohan]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]].)
==Days of Yin Metal Ox== === 選日 === The Yin Metal Ox day is the 9th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-tiū]][[de:Metall-Büffel]][[hak:Sîn-chhiú]][[ja:辛丑]][[ko:신축]][[vi:Tân Sửu]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-thiú]][[zh-yue:辛丑]][[zh:辛丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904956]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Ox|kanji=辛丑|romaji=kanoto ushi|onyomi=shinchū|p=xīnchǒu|w=hsin-ch'ou|mi=ɕin⁵³ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=san1 chau2|j=san1 chau2|ci=sɐn tsʰɐu̯|mc=sin tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=sin ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Ox''' (辛丑) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 38th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Gengzi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|lt=Gengzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengzi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Renyin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|lt=Renyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renyin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the Heavenly Stem {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents yin metal and the Earthly Branch {{ill|Chou|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin earth; according to the theory of mutual generation (土生金) in the Five Elements philosophy, earth generates metal.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Ox (辛丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: shinchu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinchuk (신축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu

=== Events === * In {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} 27th Year and [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 34th Year (1901 AD) – The {{ill|Beijing Protocol|ja|辛丑和約|lt=Beijing Protocol|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beijing Protocol|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 北京議定書|1=Boxer Protocol|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q672556}}, concerning the Boxer Rebellion (excluding Russia) among a coalition of 11 countries (including Austria, Britain, and France) and the Qing Empire, was signed. ==Months of Yin Metal Ox== In a Western calendar year whose last digit is either 1 or 6 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of December becomes the Yin Metal Ox month. (Note that here “month” may refer either to the month of the old calendar or to a seasonal month defined from [[:en:Xiaohan|Xiaohan]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]].)
==Days of Yin Metal Ox== === 選日 === The Yin Metal Ox day is the 9th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-tiū]][[de:Metall-Büffel]][[hak:Sîn-chhiú]][[ja:辛丑]][[ko:신축]][[vi:Tân Sửu]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-thiú]][[zh-yue:辛丑]][[zh:辛丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904956]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Ox|kanji=辛丑|romaji=kanoto ushi|onyomi=shinchū|p=xīnchǒu|w=hsin-ch'ou|mi=ɕin⁵³ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=san1 chau2|j=san1 chau2|ci=sɐn tsʰɐu̯|mc=sin tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=sin ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Ox''' (辛丑) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 38th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Gengzi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|lt=Gengzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengzi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Renyin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|lt=Renyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renyin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the Heavenly Stem {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents yin metal and the Earthly Branch {{ill|Chou|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin earth; according to the theory of mutual generation (土生金) in the Five Elements philosophy, earth generates metal.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Ox (辛丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: shinchu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinchuk (신축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Metal Ox (辛丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうし (kanoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうし (shinka-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: しんちゅう (shinchū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinchuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Ox== A year is designated as a Yin Metal Ox year when the Western calendar year divided by 60 leaves a remainder of 41. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Yin Metal Ox''' |- ! (Note that here “month” may refer either to the month of the old calendar or to a seasonal month defined from [[:en:Xiaohan|Xiaohan]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]].)
==Days of Yin Metal Ox== === 選日 === The Yin Metal Ox day is the 9th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-tiū]][[de:Metall-Büffel]][[hak:Sîn-chhiú]][[ja:辛丑]][[ko:신축]][[vi:Tân Sửu]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-thiú]][[zh-yue:辛丑]][[zh:辛丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904956]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Ox|kanji=辛丑|romaji=kanoto ushi|onyomi=shinchū|p=xīnchǒu|w=hsin-ch'ou|mi=ɕin⁵³ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=san1 chau2|j=san1 chau2|ci=sɐn tsʰɐu̯|mc=sin tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=sin ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Ox''' (辛丑) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 38th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Gengzi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|lt=Gengzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengzi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Renyin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|lt=Renyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renyin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the Heavenly Stem {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents yin metal and the Earthly Branch {{ill|Chou|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin earth; according to the theory of mutual generation (土生金) in the Five Elements philosophy, earth generates metal.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Ox (辛丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: shinchu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinchuk (신축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu

--> ==Years of Yin Metal Ox== A year is designated as a Yin Metal Ox year when the Western calendar year divided by 60 leaves a remainder of 41. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Yin Metal Ox''' |- ! AD|ja|2981年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2981 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |}
=== Events === * In {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} 27th Year and [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 34th Year (1901 AD) – The {{ill|Beijing Protocol|ja|辛丑和約|lt=Beijing Protocol|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beijing Protocol|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 北京議定書|1=Boxer Protocol|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q672556}}, concerning the Boxer Rebellion (excluding Russia) among a coalition of 11 countries (including Austria, Britain, and France) and the Qing Empire, was signed. ==Months of Yin Metal Ox== In a Western calendar year whose last digit is either 1 or 6 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of December becomes the Yin Metal Ox month. (Note that here “month” may refer either to the month of the old calendar or to a seasonal month defined from [[:en:Xiaohan|Xiaohan]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]].)
==Days of Yin Metal Ox== === 選日 === The Yin Metal Ox day is the 9th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 38th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Gengzi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|lt=Gengzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengzi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Renyin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|lt=Renyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renyin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the Heavenly Stem {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents yin metal and the Earthly Branch {{ill|Chou|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin earth; according to the theory of mutual generation (土生金) in the Five Elements philosophy, earth generates metal.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Ox (辛丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: shinchu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinchuk (신축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu

--> ==Years of Yin Metal Ox== A year is designated as a Yin Metal Ox year when the Western calendar year divided by 60 leaves a remainder of 41. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Yin Metal Ox''' |- ! === Events === * In {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} 27th Year and [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 34th Year (1901 AD) – The {{ill|Beijing Protocol|ja|辛丑和約|lt=Beijing Protocol|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beijing Protocol|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 北京議定書|1=Boxer Protocol|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q672556}}, concerning the Boxer Rebellion (excluding Russia) among a coalition of 11 countries (including Austria, Britain, and France) and the Qing Empire, was signed. ==Months of Yin Metal Ox== In a Western calendar year whose last digit is either 1 or 6 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of December becomes the Yin Metal Ox month. (Note that here “month” may refer either to the month of the old calendar or to a seasonal month defined from [[:en:Xiaohan|Xiaohan]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]].)
==Days of Yin Metal Ox== === 選日 === The Yin Metal Ox day is the 9th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 38th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Gengzi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|lt=Gengzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengzi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Renyin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|lt=Renyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renyin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the Heavenly Stem {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents yin metal and the Earthly Branch {{ill|Chou|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin earth; according to the theory of mutual generation (土生金) in the Five Elements philosophy, earth generates metal.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Ox (辛丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: shinchu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinchuk (신축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Metal Ox (辛丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうし (kanoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうし (shinka-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: しんちゅう (shinchū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinchuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Ox== A year is designated as a Yin Metal Ox year when the Western calendar year divided by 60 leaves a remainder of 41. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Yin Metal Ox''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! AD|ja|2861年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2861 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2921 AD|ja|2921年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2921 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2981 AD|ja|2981年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2981 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |}
=== Events === * In {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} 27th Year and [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 34th Year (1901 AD) – The {{ill|Beijing Protocol|ja|辛丑和約|lt=Beijing Protocol|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beijing Protocol|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 北京議定書|1=Boxer Protocol|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q672556}}, concerning the Boxer Rebellion (excluding Russia) among a coalition of 11 countries (including Austria, Britain, and France) and the Qing Empire, was signed. ==Months of Yin Metal Ox== In a Western calendar year whose last digit is either 1 or 6 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of December becomes the Yin Metal Ox month. (Note that here “month” may refer either to the month of the old calendar or to a seasonal month defined from [[:en:Xiaohan|Xiaohan]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]].)
==Days of Yin Metal Ox== === 選日 === The Yin Metal Ox day is the 9th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-tiū]][[de:Metall-Büffel]][[hak:Sîn-chhiú]][[ja:辛丑]][[ko:신축]][[vi:Tân Sửu]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh_min_nan:Sin-thiú]][[zh_yue:辛丑]][[zh:辛丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-tiū]][[de:Metall-Büffel]][[hak:Sîn-chhiú]][[ja:辛丑]][[ko:신축]][[vi:Tân Sửu]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh_min_nan:Sin-thiú]][[zh_yue:辛丑]][[zh:辛丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-tiū]][[de:Metall-Büffel]][[hak:Sîn-chhiú]][[ja:辛丑]][[ko:신축]][[vi:Tân Sửu]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-thiú]][[zh-yue:辛丑]][[zh:辛丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904956]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Ox|kanji=辛丑|romaji=kanoto ushi|onyomi=shinchū|p=xīnchǒu|w=hsin-ch'ou|mi=ɕin⁵³ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=san1 chau2|j=san1 chau2|ci=sɐn tsʰɐu̯|mc=sin tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=sin ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Ox''' (辛丑) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 38th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Gengzi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|lt=Gengzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengzi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Renyin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|lt=Renyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renyin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the Heavenly Stem {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents yin metal and the Earthly Branch {{ill|Chou|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin earth; according to the theory of mutual generation (土生金) in the Five Elements philosophy, earth generates metal.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Ox (辛丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: shinchu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinchuk (신축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu

--> ==Years of Yin Metal Ox== A year is designated as a Yin Metal Ox year when the Western calendar year divided by 60 leaves a remainder of 41. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Yin Metal Ox''' |- ! === Events === * In {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} 27th Year and [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 34th Year (1901 AD) – The {{ill|Beijing Protocol|ja|辛丑和約|lt=Beijing Protocol|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beijing Protocol|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 北京議定書|1=Boxer Protocol|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q672556}}, concerning the Boxer Rebellion (excluding Russia) among a coalition of 11 countries (including Austria, Britain, and France) and the Qing Empire, was signed. ==Months of Yin Metal Ox== In a Western calendar year whose last digit is either 1 or 6 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of December becomes the Yin Metal Ox month. (Note that here “month” may refer either to the month of the old calendar or to a seasonal month defined from [[:en:Xiaohan|Xiaohan]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]].)
==Days of Yin Metal Ox== === 選日 === The Yin Metal Ox day is the 9th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 38th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Gengzi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|lt=Gengzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengzi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Renyin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|lt=Renyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renyin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the Heavenly Stem {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents yin metal and the Earthly Branch {{ill|Chou|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin earth; according to the theory of mutual generation (土生金) in the Five Elements philosophy, earth generates metal.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Ox (辛丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: shinchu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinchuk (신축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu

--> ==Years of Yin Metal Ox== A year is designated as a Yin Metal Ox year when the Western calendar year divided by 60 leaves a remainder of 41. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Yin Metal Ox''' |- ! AD|ja|2981年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2981 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |}
=== Events === * In {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} 27th Year and [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 34th Year (1901 AD) – The {{ill|Beijing Protocol|ja|辛丑和約|lt=Beijing Protocol|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beijing Protocol|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 北京議定書|1=Boxer Protocol|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q672556}}, concerning the Boxer Rebellion (excluding Russia) among a coalition of 11 countries (including Austria, Britain, and France) and the Qing Empire, was signed. ==Months of Yin Metal Ox== In a Western calendar year whose last digit is either 1 or 6 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of December becomes the Yin Metal Ox month. (Note that here “month” may refer either to the month of the old calendar or to a seasonal month defined from [[:en:Xiaohan|Xiaohan]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]].)
==Days of Yin Metal Ox== === 選日 === The Yin Metal Ox day is the 9th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-tiū]][[de:Metall-Büffel]][[hak:Sîn-chhiú]][[ja:辛丑]][[ko:신축]][[vi:Tân Sửu]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-thiú]][[zh-yue:辛丑]][[zh:辛丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-tiū]][[de:Metall-Büffel]][[hak:Sîn-chhiú]][[ja:辛丑]][[ko:신축]][[vi:Tân Sửu]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-thiú]][[zh-yue:辛丑]][[zh:辛丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-tiū]][[de:Metall-Büffel]][[hak:Sîn-chhiú]][[ja:辛丑]][[ko:신축]][[vi:Tân Sửu]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-thiú]][[zh-yue:辛丑]][[zh:辛丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904956]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Ox|kanji=辛丑|romaji=kanoto ushi|onyomi=shinchū|p=xīnchǒu|w=hsin-ch'ou|mi=ɕin⁵³ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=san1 chau2|j=san1 chau2|ci=sɐn tsʰɐu̯|mc=sin tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=sin ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Ox''' (辛丑) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 38th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Gengzi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|lt=Gengzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengzi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Renyin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|lt=Renyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renyin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the Heavenly Stem {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents yin metal and the Earthly Branch {{ill|Chou|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin earth; according to the theory of mutual generation (土生金) in the Five Elements philosophy, earth generates metal.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Ox (辛丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: shinchu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinchuk (신축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu

--> ==Years of Yin Metal Ox== A year is designated as a Yin Metal Ox year when the Western calendar year divided by 60 leaves a remainder of 41. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Yin Metal Ox''' |- ! === Events === * In {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} 27th Year and [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 34th Year (1901 AD) – The {{ill|Beijing Protocol|ja|辛丑和約|lt=Beijing Protocol|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beijing Protocol|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 北京議定書|1=Boxer Protocol|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q672556}}, concerning the Boxer Rebellion (excluding Russia) among a coalition of 11 countries (including Austria, Britain, and France) and the Qing Empire, was signed. ==Months of Yin Metal Ox== In a Western calendar year whose last digit is either 1 or 6 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of December becomes the Yin Metal Ox month. (Note that here “month” may refer either to the month of the old calendar or to a seasonal month defined from [[:en:Xiaohan|Xiaohan]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]].)
==Days of Yin Metal Ox== === 選日 === The Yin Metal Ox day is the 9th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

Wikidata name: Yin Metal Ox
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Ox|kanji=辛丑|romaji=kanoto ushi|onyomi=shinchū|p=xīnchǒu|w=hsin-ch'ou|mi=ɕin⁵³ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=san1 chau2|j=san1 chau2|ci=sɐn tsʰɐu̯|mc=sin tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=sin ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Metal Ox''' (辛丑) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 38th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Gengzi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|lt=Gengzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengzi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Renyin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|lt=Renyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renyin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the Heavenly Stem {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents yin metal and the Earthly Branch {{ill|Chou|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin earth; according to the theory of mutual generation (土生金) in the Five Elements philosophy, earth generates metal.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Metal Ox (辛丑)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-ushi
***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-ushi
***Onyomi 1: shinchu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinchuk (신축)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu
